title: What Is Vitamin K2? Why Women Over 40 Need It for Strong Bones
seo_title: What Is Vitamin K2 and Why Women Over 40 Need It
meta_description: Vitamin K2 directs calcium into bones and away from arteries. Learn what research shows about vitamin K2 for bone density and cardiovascular health in women over 40.
tags: Bone Health, Vitamin K2, Menopause, Osteoporosis, Supplements, Women Over 40
